name: TIL Logistics Group Limited
summary: TIL Logistics Group Limited operates as a freight and logistics company in New Zealand. It operates through International, Specialist, Freighting, Warehousing & Logistics, and Bulk Liquids segments. The company offers international freight forwarding services for the oil and gas industry; shipping agency services; transport and lifting solutions for oversized and large items, as well as advisory services; freight transport; warehousing and supply chain solutions; and delivery of various bulk liquid goods. It also provides heavy haulage, container transport, shipping, storage and distribution, and household removals and storage services. In addition, the company offers custom clearance work, port services, ship husbandry, crew matters, tank cleaning, and various services for importers/exporters, as well as asset leasing services. It owns and operates a fleet of approximately 2,300 trucks, trailers, forklifts, and light vehicles, as well as petroleum product dangerous goods road tanker fleets under the Pacific Fuel Haul brand name. The company is headquartered in New Plymouth, New Zealand.
